mapper.sql: id, project_id, title, description, status, due_date, created_at, updated_at

where.if: and (t.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or t.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and exists ( select 1 from learning_task_tag filter_ltt join learning_tag filter_lt on filter_lt.id = filter_ltt.tag_id where filter_ltt.task_id = t.id and filter_lt.name = #{tag} )
and t.status != 'DONE' and t.due_date is not null and t.due_date < current_date

mapper.insert: insert into learning_task (project_id, title, description, status, due_date, created_at, updated_at) values (#{projectId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{dueDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update learning_task set project_id = #{projectId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, due_date = #{dueDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from learning_task
and status = #{status}
and project_id = #{projectId}
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and exists ( select 1 from learning_task_tag ltt join learning_tag lt on lt.id = ltt.tag_id where ltt.task_id = learning_task.id and lt.name = #{tag} )
and status != 'DONE' and due_date is not null and due_date < current_date
order by created_at desc

select t.id, t.project_id, p.name as project_name, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.due_date, coalesce(group_concat(distinct lt.name order by lt.name asc separator ','), '') as tag_names, coalesce(c.comment_count, 0) as comment_count, a.latest_activity_at, t.created_at, t.updated_at from learning_task t left join learning_project p on p.id = t.project_id left join ( select task_id, count(*) as comment_count from task_comment group by task_id ) c on c.task_id = t.id left join ( select task_id, max(created_at) as latest_activity_at from task_activity group by task_id ) a on a.task_id = t.id left join learning_task_tag ltt on ltt.task_id = t.id left join learning_tag lt on lt.id = ltt.tag_id
group by t.id, t.project_id, p.name, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.due_date, c.comment_count, a.latest_activity_at, t.created_at, t.updated_at order by t.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
